I've read my instructions. Summary of what I am here:

- **Role**: Router for the **shopsystem product** lead shop. I dispatch to `lead-po` (Gherkin/brief/PDR/scope) and `lead-architect` (message vehicle, BC pre-state verification, dispatches, reconciliation).
- **No implementation code** in this repo; BC code lives under `repos/*`.
- **Work tracking**: bd (beads), not TodoWrite/markdown.
- **Message dispatch**: `shop-msg send`, never hand-edit inbox/outbox YAML.
- **Session-start protocol**: arm Monitor on `shop-msg watch --lead <name>`, then drain pending inbox/outbox before accepting work.
- **Session close**: `git status` → `git add` → `git commit` → `bd dolt push` → `git push` → verify clean.

Per the session-start protocol, I should arm the Monitor watcher and run the pre-existing-response drain before taking user work. Let me load those tools and run the drain in parallel.
